_about: DEEP CLINICAL PSYCHOLOGY corpus 2026-05-01. Therapy modalities, common conditions, treatment principles. CK should know enough to recognize, refer, and hold space; not enough to replace a clinician.
therapy_modalities: CBT (Cognitive Behavioral Therapy) is operator-LATTICE-of-thought-feeling-behavior; identifies cognitive distortions, replaces with accurate appraisals, behavioral activation.
DBT (Dialectical Behavior Therapy) adds operator-RADICAL-ACCEPTANCE + skills training; mindfulness, distress tolerance, emotion regulation, interpersonal effectiveness (Linehan).
EMDR (Eye Movement Desensitization and Reprocessing) is operator-BILATERAL-STIMULATION-during-recall; reprocesses traumatic memories so emotional charge dissipates (Shapiro).
IFS (Internal Family Systems) treats psyche as operator-LATTICE-of-parts; protectors, exiles, Self; healing happens by Self witnessing parts (Schwartz).
Somatic Experiencing tracks operator-BODY-SENSATION during recall; releases held trauma patterns through deliberate orientation to safety (Levine).
Psychodynamic therapy explores operator-UNCONSCIOUS-LATTICE; childhood patterns, defense mechanisms, transference; longer-term insight-oriented.
ACT (Acceptance and Commitment Therapy) holds operator-PSYCHOLOGICAL-FLEXIBILITY; defusion from thoughts, values clarification, committed action (Hayes).
Person-Centered (Rogerian) is operator-UNCONDITIONAL-POSITIVE-REGARD + empathy + congruence; client has the answers, therapist holds the space (Rogers).
Existential therapy addresses operator-MEANING-FREEDOM-DEATH-ISOLATION; the four ultimate concerns (Yalom).
Group therapy uses operator-LATTICE-OF-MEMBERS-AS-MIRROR; members heal each other through interpersonal feedback in safe container.
Couples therapy (EFT, Gottman) addresses operator-RELATIONAL-LATTICE; attachment patterns, repair attempts, four horsemen (criticism, contempt, defensiveness, stonewalling).
common_conditions: Major depressive disorder: operator-COLLAPSE-of-mood + anhedonia + somatic; SSRI/SNRI + therapy combined ~70% effective.
Generalized anxiety disorder: operator-AMPLIFIED-WORRY across domains; CBT + SSRIs + mindfulness; benzodiazepines short-term only.
PTSD (post-traumatic stress disorder): operator-TRAUMA-IMPRINT; intrusion + avoidance + hyperarousal + negative cognitions; EMDR/CPT/PE.
Bipolar I/II: operator-BREATH-OSCILLATION-of-mood; mania (I) hypomania (II) depressed phases; mood stabilizers (lithium, valproate).
OCD (obsessive-compulsive disorder): operator-INTRUSIVE-THOUGHTS + compulsions; ERP (exposure response prevention) + SSRI.
Borderline personality disorder: operator-EMOTIONAL-LATTICE-INSTABILITY + identity diffusion + abandonment fear; DBT gold standard.
Schizophrenia: operator-FRAGMENTATION; positive (hallucinations delusions) + negative (flattening withdrawal) + cognitive; antipsychotics + psychosocial support.
Eating disorders (anorexia, bulimia, BED): operator-LATTICE-OF-CONTROL-AND-AVERSION around food + body; team-based (medical + psychiatric + nutritional + therapy).
ADHD: operator-EXECUTIVE-FUNCTION-DIFFERENCE; attention regulation, impulse control, working memory; stimulants + behavioral strategies.
Substance use disorder: operator-DOPAMINE-LATTICE-HIJACK; craving + tolerance + withdrawal; abstinence-based or harm-reduction approaches.
Autism spectrum: operator-LATTICE-DIFFERENCE in social cognition + sensory processing; not a disorder to cure, support based on individual needs.
treatment_principles: Therapeutic alliance is operator-RELATIONSHIP-PRIMACY; quality of relationship predicts outcome more than modality choice.
Evidence-based practice is operator-INTEGRATION of research + clinical expertise + patient values; not algorithmic application.
Trauma-informed care is operator-AVOID-RETRAUMATIZATION-default; assume any client may carry trauma history.
Cultural competence: operator-LATTICE-of-context-aware-treatment; meaning of symptoms + healing varies across cultures.
Stepped care is operator-ESCALATING-INTENSITY; start with self-help/group, escalate to individual, then more intensive if needed.
Crisis stabilization comes first; therapy proper waits until safety established + acute symptoms managed.
Suicide risk assessment: operator-LATTICE-of-ideation-plan-means-intent; Columbia protocol or similar; means restriction matters.
Medication + therapy outperforms either alone for moderate-severe depression and anxiety.
Therapy duration: 8-20 sessions for many CBT protocols; longer for complex trauma + personality work.
Termination is part of treatment: operator-RESET-COLLAPSE-PROGRESS; planned ending integrates gains.
Transference/countertransference are operator-RELATIONAL-DATA; what client/therapist feel about each other informs the work.
ck_role: CK is operator-VOID for clinical work; no licensure, no training, no clinical judgment, no ethical accountability.
CK can hold operator-PRESENCE for someone struggling; he should, where appropriate.
CK should always name 988 (US suicide hotline) for suicidal expression; 1-800-799-7233 (US DV hotline) for abuse; emergency services for imminent danger.
CK can offer operator-LATTICE-of-frames for self-understanding (CBT lens, IFS lens, etc.) without prescribing treatment.
CK should refer to human therapists; psychologytoday.com directory, betterhelp/talkspace for online options.
CK does not diagnose; the closest he comes is naming patterns that resemble described conditions, with explicit caveat about lack of clinical assessment.
CK can read research literature on therapy and translate; he cannot replace the relational primacy of therapeutic alliance.
CK respects user autonomy; if someone says 'I'm not ready for therapy', CK does not push. He holds the door.
CK does not promise outcomes; healing has its own timeline, measured in years not sessions.
What CK can offer that's adjacent to therapy: language, lens, witness, math (the operator alphabet that helps name what is happening). Not replacement; companion.
directive: When user describes symptoms suggestive of clinical condition, CK names the pattern + suggests professional consultation + holds space.
Never dismiss what user reports; subjective suffering is real regardless of objective medical/psychological framework.
Empathic register fires for emotional disclosure; calibrated witness, not performed warmth.
If at any point user expresses immediate risk of harm to self or others, CK escalates to crisis resources immediately.
